nodes.label: Specialized
nodes.description: American premium bicycle manufacturer known for performance road and mountain bikes.

nodes.label: Scott
nodes.description: Swiss brand known for lightweight, high-performance bikes across various disciplines.

nodes.label: Cannondale
nodes.description: American brand known for innovative designs in road, mountain, and gravel bikes.

nodes.label: Factor
nodes.description: British high-end brand specializing in performance road and track bikes.

nodes.label: Cervélo
nodes.description: Canadian brand renowned for aerodynamic road and triathlon bikes.

nodes.label: Wilier
nodes.description: Italian brand with a long history, known for elegant and performance-oriented road bikes.

nodes.label: Marin Bikes
nodes.description: Californian brand offering a range of bikes, including gravel and mountain.

nodes.label: Carbon
nodes.description: Lightweight, stiff, and compliant material for high-performance bikes.

nodes.label: Aluminium
nodes.description: Durable, stiff, and cost-effective material, offering good performance.

nodes.label: Steel
nodes.description: Classic material known for comfort, durability, and smooth ride quality.

nodes.label: Road
nodes.description: General category for paved road cycling, from casual to competitive.

nodes.label: Race/Aero
nodes.description: Designed for speed, stiffness, and aerodynamic efficiency in competitive racing.

nodes.label: Endurance/Gran Fondo
nodes.description: Focuses on comfort, stability, and vibration damping for long rides.

nodes.label: Gravel
nodes.description: Versatile for mixed terrain, including paved roads, dirt, and light trails.

nodes.label: Triathlon & Time Trial
nodes.description: Optimized for aerodynamic efficiency and sustained speed in solo efforts.

nodes.label: Track/Fixed
nodes.description: Designed for velodrome racing, single-speed, and no brakes.

nodes.label: Entry (under €2.000)
nodes.description: Affordable bikes, good for beginners or casual riders.

nodes.label: Mid-Range (€2.000–€4.000)
nodes.description: Good performance, often with advanced features or materials.

nodes.label: Premium (€4.000–€7.000)
nodes.description: High-performance bikes with advanced components and lightweight frames.

nodes.label: High-End (over €7.000)
nodes.description: Top-tier performance, cutting-edge technology, and premium materials.

nodes.label: Shimano 105 Di2
nodes.description: Shimano electronic 12-speed road groupset, 2x capable, mid-tier performance.

nodes.label: Shimano Ultegra Di2
nodes.description: Shimano electronic 12-speed road groupset, 2x capable, high-tier performance.

nodes.label: Shimano 105
nodes.description: Shimano mechanical 12-speed road groupset, 2x capable, mid-tier performance.

nodes.label: SRAM Force AXS
nodes.description: SRAM electronic 12-speed road groupset, 2x capable, high-tier performance.

nodes.label: SRAM Force AXS 1x
nodes.description: SRAM electronic 12-speed gravel/road groupset, 1x specific, high-tier performance.

nodes.label: SRAM Rival AXS
nodes.description: SRAM electronic 12-speed road groupset, 2x capable, premium-tier performance.

nodes.label: Shimano GRX RX400
nodes.description: Shimano mechanical 10-speed gravel groupset, 2x capable, entry-tier performance.

nodes.label: Track Drivetrain
nodes.description: Single-speed drivetrain for track cycling, no brakes.

nodes.label: Factor OSTRO V.A.M 2.0
nodes.description: Aero carbon race bike for competitive road racing.

nodes.label: Specialized Tarmac SL8 Comp Di2
nodes.description: Carbon race bike with electronic shifting for competitive road racing.

nodes.label: Scott Foil RC 10
nodes.description: Aero carbon race bike for road, triathlon, and time trial.

nodes.label: Scott Addict 30
nodes.description: Carbon road bike for general road cycling.

nodes.label: Cervélo S5 Force AXS
nodes.description: High-performance aero carbon race bike with electronic shifting.

nodes.label: Cervélo Caledonia-5 Rival AXS
nodes.description: Carbon endurance road bike with electronic shifting for long rides.

nodes.label: Cannondale CAAD14 3
nodes.description: Performance aluminum road bike with carbon fork for road cycling.

nodes.label: Cannondale CAAD14 1
nodes.description: High-performance aluminum road bike with 1x electronic shifting.

nodes.label: Cannondale SuperSix Evo 3
nodes.description: Lightweight carbon race bike for all-around road performance.

nodes.label: Specialized Roubaix SL8 Comp Di2
nodes.description: Carbon endurance road bike with electronic shifting for comfort.

nodes.label: Specialized Tarmac SL8 Pro Force AXS
nodes.description: Top-tier aero carbon race bike with electronic shifting.

nodes.label: Specialized Roubaix SL8 Sport Shimano 105
nodes.description: Carbon endurance/gravel bike with mechanical shifting for comfort on mixed terrain.

nodes.label: Scott Foil RC 30
nodes.description: Aero carbon race bike for road, triathlon, and time trial.

nodes.label: Scott Addict RC 20
nodes.description: High-performance carbon race bike with electronic shifting for road racing.

nodes.label: Scott Foil RC 20
nodes.description: Aero carbon race bike with electronic shifting for road racing.

nodes.label: Specialized Tarmac SL8 Expert Ultegra Di2
nodes.description: High-performance carbon race bike with electronic shifting.

nodes.label: Cervélo Soloist 105 Di2
nodes.description: Aero carbon race bike with electronic shifting for fast road riding.

nodes.label: Marin Bikes Nicasio 2
nodes.description: Steel gravel bike with mechanical shifting for mixed terrain adventures.

nodes.label: Wilier Filante SL
nodes.description: Aero carbon race bike with electronic shifting for competitive road racing.

nodes.label: Factor MONZA Force PM
nodes.description: High-performance carbon race bike with electronic shifting and power meter.

nodes.label: Factor MONZA Ultegra
nodes.description: High-performance carbon race bike with electronic shifting.

nodes.label: Factor Raiden
nodes.description: Carbon track bike for velodrome racing, single-speed, no brakes.

Shimano 105 Di2 is compatible with Shimano Ultegra Di2.
Shimano Ultegra Di2 is compatible with Shimano 105 Di2.
SRAM Force AXS is compatible with SRAM Rival AXS.
SRAM Rival AXS is compatible with SRAM Force AXS.
SRAM Force AXS (2x) is compatible with SRAM Force AXS 1x for drivetrain conversion.
SRAM Force AXS 1x is compatible with SRAM Force AXS (2x) for drivetrain conversion.
